preguntas.pregunta: [1/60] The company managed to reduce its ___ after implementing new safety protocols. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'tasa de accidentes'.
[2/60] Engineers activated the ___ to prevent an oil spill during the emergency. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'válvula de prevención de reventones (BOP)'.
[3/60] The technicians are monitoring the pressure levels from the ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'sala de control'.
[4/60] Heavy machinery must be securely fastened to the upper ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'cubierta / piso'.
[5/60] The structural engineer inspected the top of the drilling ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'torre de perforación'.
[6/60] All crew members must know the fastest route to the ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'salida de emergencia / ruta de evacuación'.
[7/60] They ordered new underwater drilling ___ for the offshore project. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'equipo / maquinaria'.
[8/60] The protective ___ successfully deflected the extreme temperatures of the exhaust. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'escudo térmico / protección contra el calor'.
[9/60] Please hold the ___ tightly while climbing up to the platform. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'escalera de mano / escala'.
[10/60] The massive ___ operates twenty miles away from the coastline. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'plataforma petrolera'.
[11/60] The production manager decided to shut down the drilling ___ for maintenance. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'torre / plataforma de perforación'.
[12/60] The crew participated in a mandatory ___ yesterday morning. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'simulacro de seguridad'.
[13/60] The ___ carefully lifted the heavy metal pipes onto the deck. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'operador de grúa / gruista'.
[14/60] The chief ___ monitored the depth of the borehole continuously. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'perforador'.
[15/60] A certified ___ repaired the faulty wiring in the main engine. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'electricista'.
[16/60] The mechanical ___ designed a more efficient cooling system. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'ingeniero/a'.
[17/60] Every ___ in the safety drill received a certificate of attendance. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'participante'.
[18/60] The ___ assisted with cleaning the deck and moving the equipment. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'peón de plataforma / obrero no cualificado'.
[19/60] Our ___ checked that everyone was wearing proper protective gear. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'oficial de seguridad / técnico de prevención'.
[20/60] The ___ approved the schedule for the new offshore drilling phase. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'gerente de obra / director de emplazamiento'.
[21/60] You should report any machinery malfunction to your direct ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'supervisor/a'.
[22/60] The industrial ___ analyzed the properties of the heat-resistant materials. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'tecnólogo/a'.
[23/60] The insurance company interviewed a ___ who saw the accident on the deck. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'testigo'.
[24/60] Medical personnel confirmed there was no ___ after the minor explosion. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'víctima / baja (accidente o lesión)'.
[25/60] You can find the technical specifications of the tools in our ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'catálogo'.
[26/60] The safety experts are attending an international ___ on offshore risks. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'conferencia / congreso'.
[27/60] A tiny subatomic particle like an ___ flows through electrical circuits. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'electrón'.
[28/60] He studied digital ___ to understand how control rooms function. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'electrónica (disciplina o componentes)'.
[29/60] Marine ___ requires extensive knowledge of underwater forces. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'ingeniería'.
[30/60] Regular ___ extends the operational lifespan of heavy drilling machinery. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'mantenimiento'.
[31/60] Understanding fluid ___ is essential for managing the pump systems. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'mecánica (la disciplina o el funcionamiento)'.
[32/60] The safety latch has a locking ___ that prevents accidental opening. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'mecanismo'.
[33/60] The technician submitted a medical certificate to request a ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'baja por enfermedad / licencia médica'.
[34/60] New robotic ___ allows operators to manage drills from a distance. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'tecnología'.
[35/60] Inspecting the electrical systems is a daily ___ for the crew. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'actividad'.
[36/60] The oil and gas industry is a major ___ in the country's economy. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'sector empresarial / sector comercial'.
[37/60] Remember to update your ___ before applying for the engineering job. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'currículum (vitae)'.
[38/60] She received her mechanical engineering ___ from a prestigious university. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'diploma / título'.
[39/60] Full-time ___ contracts include medical insurance and paid leave. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'empleo / contratación'.
[40/60] Candidates must have five years of offshore ___ on a rig. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'experiencia'.
[41/60] His official ___ is Chief Maintenance Supervisor. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'título del puesto / cargo'.
[42/60] Operating heavy crane machinery is a highly skilled ___. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'ocupación / profesión'.
[43/60] There is a vacant ___ for an assistant driller on the platform. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'puesto / cargo vacante'.
[44/60] Academic ___ is verified before anyone joins the research project. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'cualificación / título académico / aptitud'.
[45/60] Testing the backup generator is the main ___ of the electrician. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'responsabilidad'.
[46/60] We highly ___ your quick response regarding the system repair. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'agradecer / valorar / apreciar'.
[47/60] Please remember to ___ the technical report to your next email. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'adjuntar / conectar / unir'.
[48/60] Representatives from ten countries will ___ the energy conference. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'asistir a (una reunión, clase, etc.)'.
[49/60] The manager called to ___ the date of the next safety drill. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'confirmar'.
[50/60] Do not ___ to contact the safety officer if you spot a hazard. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'dudar / vacilar'.
[51/60] The inspectors will ___ the emergency escape routes tomorrow. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'inspeccionar / examinar'.
[52/60] We ___ to upgrade all control room equipment next month. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'tener la intención de / pretender'.
[53/60] Allow me to ___ our new marine logistics consultant. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'presentar (a alguien o un tema) / introducir'.
[54/60] Our main goal is to ___ all machinery in perfect working condition. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'mantener / realizar el mantenimiento'.
[55/60] Only certified personnel are allowed to ___ this drilling unit. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'operar / hacer funcionar / manejar'.
[56/60] The site managers will meet to ___ the offshore construction timeline. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'planificar / planear'.
[57/60] You must ___ any equipment malfunction to the supervisor immediately. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'informar / reportar / dar parte'.
[58/60] The technicians decided to ___ a replacement for the broken pump. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'solicitar / pedir formalmente'.
[59/60] He was hired to ___ the daily operations of the oil rig. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'dirigir / gestionar / llevar a cabo'.
[60/60] A senior engineer will ___ the junior team during the installation. Q: Choose the correct translation for 'supervisar'.
